query:
SELECT a.id, a.application_number, a.status, r.total_score, r.risk_level
FROM applications a
LEFT JOIN risk_questionnaires r ON a.id = r.application_id
WHERE r.total_score IS NOT NULL
AND a.status = 'draft'
LIMIT 5;
